name: betalent-api-tests
description: Automacao dos testes de API (restful-booker) com Newman + Allure - parte do projeto Be_Talent_TestTec_Web-API.

scripts.test: newman run restful-booker.postman_collection.json -e restful-booker.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results
scripts.test:ci: newman run restful-booker.postman_collection.json -e restful-booker.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results --color off
